name: Democratic
description: A democratic government with elected leaders and regular elections.
effects: Ruler election: Every 10 years; Leader lifespan: +10 years; Agendas available; Can use the Peacekeeping and Domination edicts.

name: Oligarchic
description: A government ruled by a small elite group.
effects: Ruler election: On ruler death; Leader lifespan: +10 years; Agendas available.

name: Dictatorial
description: A government ruled by a single individual with strong authority.
effects: Ruler election: On ruler death; Leader lifespan: +20 years; Agendas available.

name: Imperial
description: A hereditary monarchy with a dynastic ruler.
effects: Ruler election: Hereditary (no elections); Leader lifespan: +40 years; Agendas available; Heir designation.

name: Corporate
description: A mega-corporation focused on profit and trade. Requires Megacorp DLC.
effects: Ruler election: Every 20 years; Leader lifespan: +10 years; Can build Branch Offices; Uses Corporate authority mechanics.

name: Hive Mind
description: A collective consciousness with a single guiding intelligence.
effects: Immortal ruler; No factions; No consumer goods; Unique civics and gameplay.

name: Machine Intelligence
description: A synthetic consciousness governing machine pops.
effects: Immortal ruler; No factions; No consumer goods; Unique civics and gameplay.
